title: campanula ligularis
intro: Campanula ligularis, also known as the bellflower, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Campanula ligularis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe digestive issues. Traditional herbal preparations involve drying the flowers and leaves to make teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
